requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and EMC — Networked Charger Communication in Sierra Leone
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互操作与EMC——塞拉利昂联网充电桩通信
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互操作與EMC——獅子山聯網充電樁通訊

summary.en: Sierra Leone does not have an operational public EV charging network management platform as of 2026-06-14. For any networked EV charging deployment — whether a pilot project, donor-funded station, or private operator — OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) is the de facto IEC-ecosystem standard for back-office communication between charging stations and a central management system (CSMS). Sierra Leone's IEC-aligned standards adoption through SLSB means that any technically credible networked charger deployment would be expected to use OCPP rather than proprietary or China-specific back-office protocols. OCPP 1.6 and OCPP 2.0.1 are both in active international use; the applicable version should be confirmed with the project owner, operator, or donor agency. EMC requirements under IEC 61000 series apply to EVSE as electrical equipment; SLSB's IEC adoption trajectory means IEC 61000-series EMC evidence would be expected for any charger approved by SLSB or EWRC for installation. Mobile data connectivity (GSM/3G/4G) is required for remote OCPP communication; Sierra Leone has reasonable urban GSM/4G coverage in Freetown but limited rural coverage.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，塞拉利昂尚无运行中的公共电动汽车充电网络管理平台。对于任何联网电动汽车充电部署——无论是试点项目、捐助方资助充电站还是私营运营商——OCPP（开放充电点协议）是充电站与中央管理系统（CSMS）之间IEC生态系统后台通信的事实标准。塞拉利昂通过SLSB采用IEC体系标准，意味着任何具备技术可信度的联网充电桩部署预计将采用OCPP，而非专有或中国特定后台协议。OCPP 1.6和OCPP 2.0.1均在国际上广泛使用；适用版本应与项目业主、运营商或捐助机构确认。IEC 61000系列EMC要求适用于作为电气设备的EVSE；SLSB的IEC采用路径意味着任何经SLSB或EWRC批准安装的充电桩均需提供IEC 61000系列EMC证据。远程OCPP通信需要移动数据连接（GSM/3G/4G）；塞拉利昂弗里敦城市地区具备合理的GSM/4G覆盖，但农村覆盖有限。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，獅子山尚無運行中的公共電動汽車充電網絡管理平台。對於任何聯網電動汽車充電部署——無論是試點項目、捐助方資助充電站還是私營運營商——OCPP（開放充電點協議）是充電站與中央管理系統（CSMS）之間IEC生態系統後台通訊的事實標準。獅子山通過SLSB採用IEC體系標準，意味著任何具備技術可信度的聯網充電樁部署預計將採用OCPP，而非專有或中國特定後台協議。OCPP 1.6和OCPP 2.0.1均在國際上廣泛使用；適用版本應與項目業主、運營商或捐助機構確認。IEC 61000系列EMC要求適用於作為電氣設備的EVSE；SLSB的IEC採用路徑意味著任何經SLSB或EWRC批准安裝的充電樁均需提供IEC 61000系列EMC證據。遠程OCPP通訊需要移動數據連接（GSM/3G/4G）；獅子山弗里敦城市地區具備合理的GSM/4G覆蓋，但農村覆蓋有限。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — OCPP 1.6 and OCPP 2.0.1 — back-office communication for networked chargers (Open Charge Alliance)
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging infrastructure (international context)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations, and flicker
IEC 61000-4 series — Testing and measurement techniques (immunity to EMC disturbances)
SLSB (Sierra Leone Standards Bureau) — adopts IEC publications as national standards

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system — a CAN bus protocol that is not OCPP-compatible and is not interoperable with IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stacks used with CCS2. China AC charger back-office connectivity may use proprietary or OCPP-based protocols depending on the operator, but the underlying signaling uses CC/CP rather than the PP/CP signaling required for IEC 62196 Type 2 systems. For EMC, Chinese domestic chargers may hold CQC or CNAS-accredited EMC reports against GB/T standards, which are not direct substitutes for IEC 61000-series accredited evidence expected by SLSB.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP不兼容，也与CCS2所用的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩后台连接可能根据运营商情况采用专有或基于OCPP的协议，但底层信号采用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2系统所要求的PP/CP信号。EMC方面，中国国内充电桩可能持有针对GB/T标准的CQC或CNAS认可EMC报告，但这些报告不能直接替代SLSB所要求的IEC 61000系列认可证据。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP不兼容，也與CCS2所用的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁後台連接可能根據運營商情況採用專有或基於OCPP的協議，但底層信號採用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2系統所要求的PP/CP信號。EMC方面，中國國內充電樁可能持有針對GB/T標準的CQC或CNAS認可EMC報告，但這些報告不能直接替代SLSB所要求的IEC 61000系列認可證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB/T 17799 series — China EMC standards (harmonized but not identical to IEC 61000)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports OCPP 1.6 or OCPP 2.0.1 as required by the Sierra Leone project owner or donor agency; (2) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for any CCS2 DC charger; (3) mobile data SIM (GSM/4G) for remote OCPP communication is included in the hardware package — Sierra Leone has limited fixed broadband coverage; (4) OCPP back-office integration is tested and operational before commissioning; (5) IEC 61000-series EMC evidence from an ILAC-recognised laboratory is prepared for SLSB conformity; (6) harmonic injection and power-factor correction meet IEC 61000-3-2 limits, particularly important given Sierra Leone's weak grid which cannot absorb high harmonic loads. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP implementation cannot be integrated into any IEC-aligned EV charging network in Sierra Leone.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持塞拉利昂项目业主或捐助机构所要求的OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1；(2) 任何CCS2直流充电桩的GB/T 27930直流通信须替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(3) 硬件包含移动数据SIM卡（GSM/4G）以支持远程OCPP通信——塞拉利昂固定宽带覆盖有限；(4) 在调试前完成并测试OCPP后台集成；(5) 准备ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61000系列EMC证据以供SLSB合格评定；(6) 谐波注入和功率因数校正满足IEC 61000-3-2限值，这在塞拉利昂电网薄弱（无法承受高谐波负荷）的情况下尤为重要。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP实现的充电桩无法接入塞拉利昂任何IEC体系电动汽车充电网络。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持獅子山項目業主或捐助機構所要求的OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1；(2) 任何CCS2直流充電樁的GB/T 27930直流通訊須替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(3) 硬件包含移動數據SIM卡（GSM/4G）以支持遠程OCPP通訊——獅子山固定寬帶覆蓋有限；(4) 在調試前完成並測試OCPP後台集成；(5) 準備ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000系列EMC證據以供SLSB合格評定；(6) 諧波注入和功率因數校正滿足IEC 61000-3-2限值，這在獅子山電網薄弱（無法承受高諧波負荷）的情況下尤為重要。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP實現的充電樁無法接入獅子山任何IEC體系電動汽車充電網絡。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no Sierra Leone-specific OCPP mandate could be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; OCPP is the de facto IEC-ecosystem standard and would be expected by any technically credible project owner or donor agency; IEC 61000-series EMC evidence is expected for SLSB conformity; mobile data connectivity for remote monitoring is a practical necessity given Sierra Leone's infrastructure
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for OCPP-based back-office integration in Sierra Leone; China EMC reports against GB/T standards are not direct substitutes for IEC 61000-series accredited evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office capability is a practical prerequisite for any networked EV charger deployment in Sierra Leone, even without a formal government mandate. GB/T 27930-only DC communication precludes integration with any IEC-aligned management platform. Include GSM/4G SIM capability for remote connectivity given limited fixed broadband in Sierra Leone. Prepare IEC 61000-series EMC evidence for SLSB conformity assessment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 即便没有正式的政府强制要求，OCPP后台能力也是塞拉利昂任何联网电动汽车充电桩部署的实际前提条件。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信将无法接入任何IEC体系管理平台。鉴于塞拉利昂固定宽带有限，须包含GSM/4G SIM卡以支持远程连接。准备IEC 61000系列EMC证据以供SLSB合格评定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 即便沒有正式的政府強制要求，OCPP後台能力也是獅子山任何聯網電動汽車充電樁部署的實際前提條件。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊將無法接入任何IEC體系管理平台。鑒於獅子山固定寬帶有限，須包含GSM/4G SIM卡以支持遠程連接。準備IEC 61000系列EMC證據以供SLSB合格評定。
